metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.title: NewCalculationGUID
text.description: The GUID of the Calculation that has been created

text_1.title: SourceCalculationGUID
text_1.description: The GUID of the source Calculation that has been copied

text_2.title: ProcessingLogGUID
text_2.description: The GUID of the Processing Log for the Parent Flow

text_3.title: ProcessOwnerGUID
text_3.description: The GUID of the User that initiated the process

text_4.description: The Name of the Calculation that has been created
text_4.title: NewCalculationName

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run was successful. All required Parameters have been added to the Calculation.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run has failed. Calculation Parameters may have been partially added to Calculation. Check Log for further details.

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Create_Calculation_Surcharge_Groups')?['Ids'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_Calculation_Surcharge_Groups')?['body/value'])} Surcharge Groups successfully added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding Calculation Surcharge Groups! @{length(outputs('Get_created_Calculation_Surcharge_Groups')?['body/value'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_Calculation_Surcharge_Groups')?['body/value'])} Surcharge Groups added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding Calculation Metal Prices! @{length(outputs('Get_created_Calculation_Metal_Prices')?['body/value'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_Calculation_Metalprices')?['body/value'])} Metal Prices added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding Calculation Sales Prices! @{length(outputs('Get_created_Calculation_Sales_Prices')?['body/value'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_Calculation_Salesprices')?['body/value'])} Sales Prices added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding Calculation Payment Terms! @{length(outputs('Get_created_Calculation_Payment_Terms')?['body/value'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_Calculation_Payment_Terms')?['body/value'])} Payment Terms added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}
